calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Diana Padilla. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-02-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2003 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Feb-03-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.(Consolidated With Case #322946)
Off Calendar Oct-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR. Janet Pond
Appearances:
Lina R. Guillen, Esq. for Petitioner: Kim Chester present as guardian ad litem for Austin Smith IV, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:

Compromise: $120,000.00
Medical expenses of $14,000.00
Reimbursement of legal/Costs to attorney $1,000.00
Attorney's fees: $30,000.00

Future periodic payments totalling $223,297.00 paid as follows: $15,000.00 per year for 4 years beginning Sept. 1, 2015 and ending Sept. 1, 2018; a lump sum payment of $60,000.00 payable Sept. 1, 2022, and a lump sum payment of $103,297 payable Sept. 1 2027. All payments to Austin Smith IV directly.

COUNSEL TO SUBMIT ORDER ON JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM.
Matter taken under submission.
October 10, 2003:
Judgment signed.
